title: pavonia pohlii
intro: Pavonia pohlii, also known as the Mexican Rosemallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, particularly in Mexico and Costa Rica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia pohlii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for various health applications.
